objective: Ensure calculations, unit conversions, rounding, display qualification, and denial traces remain deterministic and safe.

cases.title: Unit conversion test vectors match
cases.failureMode: Server, SDK, and UI preview diverge on unit conversion.
given: Formula catalog and unit conversion trace exist.
then: Results match exact expected values, units, rounding stages, and trace refs.

assertions.statement: Numeric vectors are deterministic across runtime and SDK.

cases.title: Display rounding does not change governed result
cases.failureMode: Rounded display value is written back as governed calculation.
given: CalculationResult contains canonical and display values.
when: UI displays rounded value and submits follow-on workflow.
then: Follow-on workflow uses canonical value or formula trace, not rounded display text.

assertions.statement: Display value is never used as governed calculation input by default.

cases.title: Unresolved product/unit/area refuses calculation
cases.failureMode: UI invents hidden formula or assumptions when required calculation inputs are unresolved.
given: CalculationSpec is missing product binding or unit basis.
then: CalculationResult refuses high-consequence use and identifies missing inputs.

assertions.statement: No hidden UI formula for unresolved inputs.

cases.title: Qualification survives API to SDK to UI
cases.failureMode: Stale/disputed/redacted/evidence-insufficient states are dropped during client mapping.
when: SDK deserializes and UI renders it.
then: UI preserves all qualification flags and blocks unsafe actions.

assertions.statement: Qualification fields are not optional decoration in UI.

cases.title: Preflight denial trace matches approved structure
cases.failureMode: Agent receives denial but cannot tell which gate failed.
then: Trace includes request summary, actor, authority gate, evidence gate, pack/profile context, reason codes, and safe next actions.

assertions.statement: Denial explanations are structured and replayable.

cases.title: Dry-run has no side effects
cases.failureMode: Preflight or dry-run accidentally creates canonical, materialized, or publication state.
then: Trace shows gates evaluated but no canonical/materialization/publication state written.

acceptanceCriteria: Numeric vectors remain deterministic across runtime and SDK.
Qualification states survive API, SDK, and UI mapping.
